basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for 28 Non-Teaching Group A Posts (Advt No. 02/2026-27)
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Banaras Hindu University), Varanasi
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Banaras Hindu University), Varanasi has invited online applications for 28 Group A posts across the Administrative, Technical, Library, System Analyst, IWD, Rajbhasha and Sports cadres. Eligible candidates can apply through the SAMARTH Portal from 11 July 2026 to 10 August 2026 (till 5:00 PM). No other mode of application will be accepted.

important_dates.deadline to forward printout via proper: Within 7 days after the last date of submission

application_fee.details: The fee must be paid online through the payment gateway using Internet Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, or UPI. The fee, once paid, is not refundable under any circumstances and cannot be adjusted against any other application or selection process.

age_limit.details: Age eligibility is reckoned as on the last date of submission of the online application, i.e. 10 August 2026. | Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms. Specific relaxation figures (in years, by category) are Not specified in this notification.

qualification.details: Essential qualification and experience requirements differ by post. A summary is given below; candidates should verify the complete essential and desirable criteria - including the full list of specialization areas for Technical Officer posts - in the official notification before applying. | Desirable qualifications for all three Technical Officer posts cover specialized experience areas such as instrumentation design, spectroscopy, X-ray diffraction, mechanical testing, wireless communication systems, and life sciences - the full list of 16 specialization areas is given in the official notification. | Educational qualification and experience for all Library Cadre posts will be as per UGC guidelines as amended from time to time.

salary_details.details: Exact in-hand salary figures are Not specified in the notification. Pay is based on the 7th Central Pay Commission (7th CPC) Pay Level applicable to each post (ranging from Pay Level 10 to Pay Level 14), plus the usual allowances admissible under IIT (BHU) rules in the corresponding Pay Matrix.

selection_process: The notification does not list a fixed
post-wise selection process. It states that the schedule for a Screening Test
and/or Personal Interview - as applicable - will be communicated to shortlisted candidates by email. The exact combination of stages used for each specific post is Not specified in the notification.
how_to_apply: Visit the SAMARTH Portal at iitbhunt.samarth.edu.in
Register and fill in the online application form for the relevant post code
Upload all required supporting documents, and NOC/Vigilance Clearance if currently in service
Pay the applicable application fee online (Rs. 500/- for General/EWS/OBC; Nil for SC/ST/PwD/Female)
Submit the application before 10 August 2026, 5:00 PM
Take a printout of the submitted application form and preserve it for future reference

Send the printout, along with supporting documents and the Annexure-A experience certificate, by Speed Post to: The Registrar, IIT (BHU), Varanasi - 221005, in a sealed envelope superscribed with the application form number, advertisement number, and post name/code, within 7 days of the last date
important_instructions: Applications will be accepted online only; no other mode of submission is entertained Eligibility will be assessed as on 10 August 2026, the last date of online submission No change, correction, or modification is allowed after the application is submitted Reservation and age relaxation are applicable as per Government of India rules Mere fulfilment of eligibility criteria does not guarantee a call for the selection process; the Institute may apply more stringent shortlisting criteria The Institute reserves the right to increase, decrease, postpone, or cancel the recruitment for any or all posts without assigning any reason All correspondence will be through the registered email address only; no hard-copy letters will be sent Canvassing in any manner will lead to disqualification Any dispute is subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Varanasi

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Recruitment 2026: Notification
content_sections.text: Download IIT BHU Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Here Apply Online (SAMARTH Portal)

rows.details: Indian Institute of Technology (Banaras Hindu University), Varanasi

rows.event: Deadline to Forward Printout via Proper Channel (where applicable)
rows.date: Within 7 days after the last date of submission

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The 28 vacancies are distributed across 16 posts in 7 cadres as follows: One post of Technical Officer (across the Group-I/II/III postings) is earmarked for Persons-with-Disability (PwD) under Blindness or Low Vision, Hearing Impairment, Locomotor Disability, or Cerebral Palsy.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential qualification and experience requirements differ by post. A summary is given below; candidates should verify the complete essential and desirable criteria - including the full list of specialization areas for Technical Officer posts - in the official notification before applying. Desirable qualifications for all three Technical Officer posts cover specialized experience areas such as instrumentation design, spectroscopy, X-ray diffraction, mechanical testing, wireless communication systems, and life sciences - the full list of 16 specialization areas is given in the official notification. Educational qualification and experience for all Library Cadre posts will be as per UGC guidelines as amended from time to time.

rows.essential_qualification_summary: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks (or equivalent Grade B, UGC 7-point scale) plus at least 5 years' relevant administrative experience in Pay Level 7 or above in Central/State Govt., autonomous bodies, PSUs, research organizations, or a Top-30 NIRF-ranked institute

M.Tech in Electrical/Electronics/Mechanical/Instrumentation & Control Engineering (min. 55%) with 5 years' experience in Pay Level 11 or 8 years in Pay Level 10; OR Ph.D in the same fields with at least 8 years' relevant experience (5 years as Technical Officer in Pay Level 10 or equivalent)

Bachelor's in Pharmaceutical Engineering (min. 55%) plus 7 years' experience in Pay Level 7 or above; OR M.Tech in Pharmaceutical Engineering plus 4 years; OR Master's in Chemistry plus 5 years, all in Pay Level 7 or above in Central/State Govt./PSU/research organization/Top-30 NIRF institute

Bachelor's in Electrical/Electronics/Bio-Medical Engineering (min. 55%) plus 7 years' experience in Pay Level 7 or above; OR M.Tech in the same fields plus 4 years; OR Master's in Physics plus 5 years, in Pay Level 7 or above
Bachelor's in Civil Engineering (min. 55%) plus 7 years' experience in Pay Level 7 or above; OR M.Tech in Civil Engineering plus 4 years, in Pay Level 7 or above

Master's in Library/Information Science/Documentation (min. 55% or Grade B) plus minimum 18 years' post-qualification experience as College Librarian/Assistant Librarian, OR 13 years as Deputy Librarian/equivalent in Pay Level 12, plus evidence of innovative library service and published work

Master's in Library/Information Science/Documentation (min. 55% or Grade B) plus 5 years' experience as Assistant University/College Librarian in Pay Level 10, plus evidence of innovative service and computerization of library

Master's in Library/Information/Documentation Science or equivalent (min. 55%) plus at least 5 years' relevant experience in Pay Level 7 or above, plus must have cleared UGC/CSIR NET or an accredited equivalent (SLET/SET)
B.E./B.Tech in CS/IT or MCA (first class) plus 7 years' relevant experience in Pay Level 12; OR M.E./M.Tech in CS/IT (first class) plus 5 years' experience in Pay Level 12
B.E./B.Tech/MCA (first class) plus at least 10 years' relevant experience (8 years in Pay Level 10+); OR M.E./M.Tech (first class) plus at least 8 years' experience (5 years in Pay Level 10+)

B.E./B.Tech/MCA (first class) plus at least 6 years' relevant experience; OR M.E./M.Tech (first class) plus 4 years' relevant experience in System Administration/Network Management/Web Development/Programming

B.E./B.Tech in Civil/Electrical/Mechanical (First Division) plus 8 years' experience in Pay Level 10; OR Master's degree in the relevant field (First Division) plus 6 years' experience in Pay Level 10

B.E./B.Tech in Electrical/Mechanical/Civil (First Division) plus minimum 3 years' experience in Pay Level 8; OR 3-year Diploma in Engineering (First Division) plus minimum 8 years' post-qualification experience, at least 3 years in Pay Level 8

Master's Degree in Hindi with English as a main subject at degree level (or equivalent Hindi/English combination, min. 55%) plus 8 years' terminological/translation experience in Pay Level 6 or above, or 5 years in Pay Level 7 or above
Master's in Physical Education/Sports Science (min. 55%) plus 5 years' relevant experience in Pay Level 10 or above (Ph.D duration up to 3 years counted towards experience where applicable)

Master's in Physical Education/Sports Science (min. 55% or Grade B) with a diploma in sports coaching, or having represented university/state at national level, plus 6 years' post-qualification experience organizing games/sports at University/Inter-College level, with specialization in at least one recognized sport

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age eligibility is reckoned as on the last date of submission of the online application, i.e. 10 August 2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms. Specific relaxation figures (in years, by category) are Not specified in this notification.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Recruitment 2026: Salary
content_sections.text: Exact in-hand salary figures are Not specified in the notification. Pay is based on the 7th Central Pay Commission (7th CPC) Pay Level applicable to each post (ranging from Pay Level 10 to Pay Level 14), plus the usual allowances admissible under IIT (BHU) rules in the corresponding Pay Matrix.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Recruitment 2026: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The fee must be paid online through the payment gateway using Internet Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, or UPI. The fee, once paid, is not refundable under any circumstances and cannot be adjusted against any other application or selection process.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The notification does not list a fixed, post-wise selection process. It states that the schedule for a Screening Test, Written Test, Presentation, Group Discussion, and/or Personal Interview - as applicable - will be communicated to shortlisted candidates by email. The exact combination of stages used for each specific post is Not specified in the notification.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for IIT BHU Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Self-attested photocopies of all supporting documents mentioned in the online application Caste certificate (for SC/ST/OBC candidates) in the format prescribed by the Government of India OBC candidates applying under the reserved category must submit a non-creamy-layer certificate not older than six months Experience certificate in the prescribed format (Annexure-A) No Objection Certificate (NOC) and Vigilance Clearance, for candidates currently serving in Government/Semi-Government organizations, Autonomous Bodies, or Educational Institutions Printout of the final submitted online application form

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications will be accepted online only; no other mode of submission is entertained Eligibility will be assessed as on 10 August 2026, the last date of online submission No change, correction, or modification is allowed after the application is submitted Reservation and age relaxation are applicable as per Government of India rules Mere fulfilment of eligibility criteria does not guarantee a call for the selection process; the Institute may apply more stringent shortlisting criteria The Institute reserves the right to increase, decrease, postpone, or cancel the recruitment for any or all posts without assigning any reason All correspondence will be through the registered email address only; no hard-copy letters will be sent Canvassing in any manner will lead to disqualification Any dispute is subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Varanasi

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 10 August 2026 at 5:00 PM. Applications opened on 11 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in IIT BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 28 vacancies across 16 posts in 7 cadres: Administrative, Technical, Library, System Analyst, IWD, Rajbhasha, and Sports.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for IIT BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Rs. 500/- (non-refundable) for General, EWS, and OBC candidates. There is no fee for SC, ST, PwD, and Female candidates.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for IIT BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the SAMARTH Portal (iitbhunt.samarth.edu.in). A printout of the submitted form, along with supporting documents, must also be sent by Speed Post to the Registrar, IIT (BHU), Varanasi, within 7 days of the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 posts?
faq.answer: The upper age limit varies by post, ranging from 40 years (System Analyst) to 57 years (Librarian). Age is calculated as on 10 August 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there a post reserved for PwD candidates in IIT BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. One Technical Officer post is earmarked for Persons-with-Disability under Blindness or Low Vision, Hearing Impairment, Locomotor Disability, or Cerebral Palsy.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IIT BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify a fixed process for each post. It states that a Screening Test, Written Test, Presentation, Group Discussion, and/or Personal Interview - as applicable - will be scheduled, with details emailed to shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the correct advertisement number for this recruitment - 01/2026-27 or 02/2026-27?
faq.answer: The notification itself is inconsistent: the document header states 02/2026-27, while every page footer states 01/2026-27. Candidates should confirm the correct number on the official IIT BHU recruitment webpage before submitting their application.
